title: Developer Dashboard
description: A responsive analytics dashboard for tracking development metrics, CI status, and release health.

title: API Integration Layer
description: A clean REST API service that aggregates third-party data and provides consistent responses for web clients.

title: Task Planner App
description: A task management tool with calendar views, prioritization, and activity tracking for small engineering teams.

title: Portfolio Site Redesign
description: A modern portfolio website built with custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to highlight projects and experience.

title: Code Review Assistant
description: A lightweight app that helps teams track code review status, review notes, and team contributions.

title: Microservice Prototype
description: A prototype for a scalable microservice with job queuing, health checks, and metrics reporting.
